generated_oml:
// Sensing components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder on motor shaft of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder on gearbox output of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor on the motor of the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// Data derived from transmitted data
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live motor angular position stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live gearbox angular position stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live motor current stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

// Derived data
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque calculated from motor current via simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity calculated from motor position via simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration calculated from angular velocity via simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

// Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker streaming sensor data to digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService, RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink runtime executing simulation and identification models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService, FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionModelUpdatingService
]

instance ModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to support SysML modeling"
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for creating structural and behavioral models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelingService
]

instance AssetRepresentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to support Asset Administration Shell integration"
]

instance AASEnvelope : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset representation and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetRepresentationService
]

instance UnifiedDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified web‑based dashboard displaying live and derived data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// Models
instance MotorStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of the motor in the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance MotorBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML behavioral model of the motor including motion dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance GearboxStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of the gearbox in the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance GearboxBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML behavioral model of the gearbox including gear dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox used in the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Coulomb‑Viscous friction applied to the motor/gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Stribeck friction phenomenon"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of Dahl friction hysteresis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of LuGre friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink data calculation model deriving torque from motor current"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance AngularVelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink data calculation model deriving angular velocity from position"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

instance AccelerationCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink data calculation model deriving angular acceleration from velocity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkRuntime
]

// Services
instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates and stores sensor and simulation data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSetInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes live data and derived simulation outputs on a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDashboardInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs continuous multi‑physics‑aware identification of joint friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterEstimationInsight, WearStateInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes MATLAB/Simulink simulation models of motor and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutcomeInsight
]

instance FrictionModelUpdatingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updates friction model parameters to improve robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationAction, ControllerUpdateAction, MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

// Insights
instance LiveDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live‑time visualization of sensor data and derived simulation outputs"
]

instance FrictionParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated friction parameters for the motor‑gearbox joint obtained from continuous identification"
]

instance WearStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of joint wear state based on friction trend analysis"
]

instance SimulationOutcomeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results of the latest simulation run including predicted torque, velocity, and acceleration"
]

instance DataSetInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated dataset of sensor and simulation data for historical analysis"
]

// Actions
instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation to perform maintenance based on wear state insight"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControllerUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of motion controller parameters using updated friction estimates"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts robot motion control to enhance accuracy after friction model update"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time execution; sensor data streamed continuously via MQTT and simulation models executed in real time to provide up‑to‑date friction estimates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A constellation comprising the asset (MABI MAX first axis), engineering models (Structural & Behavioral SysML), simulation models (Simulink), data calculation models, a processing component to compute data traces and generate outputs, Asset Administration Shells, and a dashboard for visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (engineering and behavioral models), Simulation of system dynamics, Validation and usage within the digital shadow (continuous friction identification during operation), Deployment of the dashboard for visualization and monitoring."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of data traces to originating processing components and models, continuous online identification to account for wear, load, and temperature effects, and comparison of simulated and measured data for error assessment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; digital shadow processes the data via a processing component; Asset Administration Shells provide semantic metadata."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for modeling, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as per industry standards, and open data communication via MQTT standard."
]
